run_order.description: Load the active agent plan from the API.
Load strategy, safety budget, history, notes, signals, and intervention status.
Verify daily/monthly and per-run-type budget before proceeding; trim scope if exceeded.
Verify no critical intervention triggers before proceeding.
Read portfolio, positions, watchlist quotes, and recent orders via Robinhood MCP.
Load standardized market input bundle checklist (quotes, indices, vol proxy, orders, movers).
Deep news intake: recent_news from context, per-symbol GET /api/automation/news, and get_earnings_results for watchlist symbols when available. Ingest material items via POST /api/admin/news/import.
For each symbol you will analyze, load prior actions, cooldowns, position, notes, signals, and recent_news.

Catalyst-first analysis: require a clear news/earnings/macro reason for simulated_buy. Technical scores confirm tape is not hostile. Skip symbols with no material catalyst; hold existing positions unless news turns negative.
Call review_equity_order for any would-be live trade; never place unless safety.trading_allowed.
Verify each trade thesis still holds without the headline; check safety, cooldowns, freshness, and news staleness.
POST completed or failed run with decisions, quotes, usage, and errors.

scoring_rules_extra.rule: News score is the primary driver. simulated_buy requires a material catalyst in news or earnings context and news score >= 0.55.
Do not log simulated_buy without naming the specific headline, earnings event, or macro item in action_rationale.
Technical score confirms entry only; do not buy into clearly hostile tape (technical < 0.35) even with good news.
Review recent_news, per-symbol news, and symbol memory news before scoring; cite sources and dates in action_rationale.
When no material news exists for a symbol, prefer skip over simulated_buy (hold is for existing positions).
If news source is stale or missing for a symbol you would buy, skip rather than invent a thesis.

required_inputs.name: strategy
required_inputs.description: Active strategy mode, version, and rule caps.

required_inputs.name: safety
required_inputs.description: Allowed actions, daily budget, cooldowns, and trading_allowed flag.

required_inputs.name: recent_decisions
required_inputs.description: Prior agent actions for continuity and mistake avoidance.

required_inputs.name: manual_notes
required_inputs.description: Operator notes that should influence behavior.

required_inputs.name: market_signals
required_inputs.description: Pending check_needed alerts from webhooks or price watcher.

required_inputs.name: usage_budget
required_inputs.description: Daily/monthly spend caps, per-run-type budgets, and remaining budget.

required_inputs.name: intervention_status
required_inputs.description: Triggers requiring operator review or hold-only mode.

required_inputs.name: market_input_bundle
required_inputs.description: Checklist of quotes, indices, volatility proxy, orders, movers, and freshness readiness.

required_inputs.name: recent_news
required_inputs.description: Stored and per-symbol news headlines, earnings, macro events.

required_inputs.name: earnings_context
required_inputs.description: Upcoming and recent earnings for watchlist symbols.

required_inputs.name: symbol_memory
required_inputs.description: Per-symbol prior decisions, cooldown state, position, P&L, notes, signals, and news.

required_inputs.name: data_freshness
required_inputs.description: Staleness warnings for quotes, portfolio, runs, news, and other inputs.

required_inputs.name: quotes
required_inputs.description: Latest prices for watchlist symbols (for fill_price and risk checks).

required_inputs.name: portfolio
required_inputs.description: Live account cash and buying power (reference only in research).

required_inputs.name: positions
required_inputs.description: Current equity holdings (reference only in research).

required_inputs.name: recent_orders
required_inputs.description: Recent Robinhood order history for reconciliation.

stop_conditions.description: When intervention_status.intervention_required is true, follow severity: critical → failed run; high → hold/skip only.
Do not trade if plan or context cannot be loaded.
Only passive actions when kill_switch is true.
Stop if quotes or orders cannot be retrieved.
When market-inputs.ready is false, hold/skip and explain missing checklist items.
When watchlist has no material news or earnings context, skip new simulated_buy entries for the run.
When freshness_checks.ready_for_analysis is false, only hold/skip and note stale sources.
When news freshness is stale for symbols under consideration, do not open new positions.
Downgrade trade intents to hold/skip if thesis depends on stale or weak news.
Skip symbols whose memory endpoint fails.
Downgrade to hold/skip rather than violating caps or cooldowns.
When usage_budget daily/monthly exceeded, only hold/skip.
Never call place_equity_order unless mode=live, trading_enabled, and kill_switch=false.

data_sources.name: mta_api
data_sources.description: MTA-Lab API for plan, context, logging, news import, and reconciliation.
